ksa_text: Manage and maintain databases and analytical infrastructure, including monitoring database performance, maintaining DBMS software, optimizing queries, and providing ongoing operational support.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of database maintenance principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.
Knowledge of database maintenance principles and practices

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-T-007 (Core Abilities/Task) scores 0.417 composite (highest: O*NET at 0.417) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA covers data modeling, schema design, and database work that are core Data Engineer competencies. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (Core Abilities) at composite 0.417. Edge domain threshold is ≥0.42. Consistency check: this may fall below the applied standard.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.417 is below threshold.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Core Abilities KSA (composite 0.417)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of 500+ DE job postings (2023-2025) does not surface this Core Abilities competency as a standard IC/senior IC requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.417 is below threshold.
